dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires detection of 'rising volume trend leading into breakout'. Approximated using bar-by-bar volume comparison (volume > prev_volume) as proxy for rising trend confirmation. Bulkowski's success rates vary significantly by market regime (27% bull-up, 16% bull-down, -13% bear-up, -23% bear-down), indicating low predictive power in bear markets. No specific exit criteria provided (AUTHOR_SILENT), so implemented volume reversal (declining volume) as reasonable mean-reversion exit. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per source, allowing both long and short entries based on market regime.
